curation_notes: Patch commit (59188e0) is the squash merge of PR #11126 ('fix: correct size for HeapValueType::Array size') into master, with parent e576ac2. The patch touched 31 files (+613/-206) but the core vulnerability is in allocate_foreign_call_result_array() in brillig_call/mod.rs, where Type::Array(_, nested_size) discards inner types and passes only the semantic length to allocate_brillig_array(), under-allocating for composite element types like tuples. The broader refactoring introduced typed length wrappers (SemanticLength, SemiFlattenedLength) across many files, making the patch noisy. Pre-assigned class buffer-overflow is correct: CWE-131 (Incorrect Calculation of Buffer Size) leads to heap writes beyond allocated bounds.
